prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约288→319→765→661，整体呈后移趋势，近2年波动于661–765区间；2025年位次，以2024年661名为最近基准；本省理科计划2021–2024年均为6人；2026年物理类计划8人，较2024年扩招约33.3%，竞争压力有所缓解，推动位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高 校；软科主榜2026年约第56名，排名稳定，属全国知名政法类顶尖学府；2024年声誉偏负面（内蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌），2026年声誉偏负面（校园安全事 件）；抖音热度总排名第6（高热），关注度极高；法学A+，全国唯一法学A+学科，对理科高分考生同样有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度2 024年评估为"分化观望"，仍属偏热专业；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人，物理类按历史比例估算约30672人，较2025年物理类30457人微增，竞争 略有加剧；中国政法大学位于北京，跨省招生；青海省理科招生人数极少（仅6–8人），地域偏好不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合近2年理科位次在661–765区间波动的走势、2026年物理类计划扩招（+33.3%）的缓解效应、抖音高热带来的关注度提升，以及考生总数微增的微弱竞争加剧，在2024年基准661 名基础上，扩招效应主导位次数字小幅增大；预测2026年物理类最低位次约823名，区间675–971名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学（经济学双学士学位项目）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 物理类仅设法学及法学（经济学双学士学位）两个专业，位次在预测区间675–971名内，建议以法学（经济学双学士学位）作为稳妥选择、法学作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限 （接近675名）可重点冲刺法学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science students was approximately 288 → 319 → 765 → 661, showing an overall backward trend, fluctuating between 661 and 765 in the recent two years; for 2025, the ranking is based on the 2024 figure of 661 as the most recent benchmark; the provincial science enrollment plan was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2024; in 2026, the physics category plan is 8 students, an increase of about 33.3% compared to 2024, easing competition pressure and pushing the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable standing, belonging to a nationally renowned top political science and law institution; in 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (the minimum admission score for science law majors in Inner Mongolia plummeted), and in 2026, reputation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents); overall ranking 6th on Douyin (high popularity), with extremely high attention; law is rated A+, the only law A+ discipline nationwide, which also strongly attracts high-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', still a relatively popular major; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000, with the physics category estimated at about 30,672 based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, recruiting across provinces; the number of science students recruited in Qinghai Province is very small (only 6–8), so regional preference is not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of science rankings in the 661–765 range over the past two years, the easing effect of the 2026 physics category enrollment expansion (+33.3%), the increased attention from high Douyin popularity, and the slight intensification of competition due to a marginal increase in total candidates, based on the 2024 benchmark of 661, the expansion effect dominates, leading to a slight increase in the ranking number; the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 physics category is approximately 823, with a range of 675–971.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None at present
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The physics category only offers two majors: Law and Law (Economics Dual Degree Program). With rankings within the predicted range of 675–971, it is recommended to choose Law (Economics Dual Degree Program) as a safe option and Law as a reach; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 675), focus on aiming for the Law major.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 213 → 431 → 126 → 2073, with a significant backward shift in 2024 (about 1947 places behind 2023), showing high volatility; for 2025, the ranking uses 2024's 2073 as the nearest baseline; the provincial liberal arts plan was 17 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 18 in 2024; the 2026 history category plan is 30 students, a substantial expansion of about 66.7% compared to 2024, significantly easing competition pressure and pushing the ranking number larger.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (Inner Mongolia science law admission score plummeted), in 2026, reputation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin heat ranking total 6th (high heat), extremely high attention on short video platforms, may attract more candidates to apply; Law A+ (the only law A+ discipline nationwide), top-tier academic strength, highly matched with enrollment majors, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates; 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 56th, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, a nationally renowned top political and legal institution.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity in 2024 assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see', cooling compared to 2022 (70.09), but still a relatively hot major; Qinghai Province 2026 general college entrance exam total number about 48,000 (uncertain), slightly increased from 2025 (history category 17,212 + physics category 30,457 = 47,669), competition slightly intensifies; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, cross-province enrollment; Qinghai Province enrollment proportion is very small, regional preference factor is not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the significant backward shift trend in 2024 rankings, the notable easing effect of the large expansion in 2026 history category plan (+66.7%), the increased attention from Douyin heat, and the slight competition intensification from a small increase in Qinghai total candidates, based on the 2024 baseline of 2073, the expansion effect dominates the ranking number to increase significantly; predict the 2026 history category minimum ranking approximately 2952, range 2452–3452.
